items.name: theme
items.title: Theme
items.description: The swiftcn design-token system: Theme struct in the SwiftUI environment, adaptive light/dark colors, the Tailwind palette, and the default zinc theme.

items.name: dashboard-block
items.title: Dashboard Block
items.description: A Swiftcn-native analytics block as a ready-made screen: an `SCSidebarLayout(collapsible: .icon)` with a compact navigation sidebar and a scrolling detail pane of stat cards (adaptive grid: four across on regular widths, 2×2 on compact), an "Overview" bar chart card, and a "Recent Sales" card.

items.name: dashboard01-block
items.title: Dashboard01 Block
items.description: A functional SwiftUI port of shadcn's `dashboard-01` application shell.

items.name: login-block
items.title: Login Block
items.description: A complete login screen — the swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's `login-01` block.

items.name: login02-block
items.title: Login02 Block
items.description: The swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's `login-02` block.

items.name: login03-block
items.title: Login03 Block
items.description: The swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's `login-03` block.

items.name: login04-block
items.title: Login04 Block
items.description: The swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's `login-04` block.

items.name: login05-block
items.title: Login05 Block
items.description: The swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's `login-05` block.

items.name: settings-block
items.title: Settings Block
items.description: A complete settings screen — the grouped-cards layout every iOS app ships: a profile card, a preferences card (switches + theme select), and a danger zone.

items.name: sidebar-block
items.title: Sidebar Block
items.description: A functional SwiftUI adaptation of shadcn's `sidebar-07` application shell.

items.name: sidebar01-block
items.title: Sidebar01 Block
items.description: A documentation navigation destination used by the functional sidebar-01 block.

items.name: sidebar02-block
items.title: Sidebar02 Block
items.description: Sidebar-02 is a thin composition over sidebar-01's documentation engine; its defining behavior is independently collapsible, initially open groups.

items.name: sidebar03-block
items.title: Sidebar03 Block
items.description: Sidebar-03 is the submenu configuration of the shared documentation sidebar engine.

items.name: sidebar04-block
items.title: Sidebar04 Block
items.description: Sidebar-04 configures the shared documentation engine as a wider floating sidebar with compact, guide-less submenus.

items.name: sidebar05-block
items.title: Sidebar05 Block
items.description: Sidebar-05 configures the shared documentation engine with real search and independently collapsible nested navigation groups.

items.name: sidebar08-block
items.title: Sidebar08 Block
items.description: Sidebar-08 configures the shared application engine with a static organization header, separately selectable/disclosable primary rows, and secondary navigation pinned below Projects.

items.name: sidebar09-block
items.title: Sidebar09 Block
items.description: A functional two-pane mail sidebar.

items.name: sidebar10-block
items.title: Sidebar10 Block
items.description: A functional Notion-style sidebar and page-actions popover.

items.name: sidebar11-block
items.title: Sidebar11 Block
items.description: A functional source-control changes and file-tree sidebar with arbitrary caller data, controlled selection/expansion, and caller-owned detail.

items.name: sidebar12-block
items.title: Sidebar12 Block
items.description: A functional calendar workspace matching shadcn's `sidebar-12` composition.

items.name: sidebar13-block
items.title: Sidebar13 Block
items.description: A settings dialog with a real selectable sidebar and caller-owned content.

items.name: sidebar14-block
items.title: Sidebar14 Block
items.description: A right-side table-of-contents sidebar with real selection and routing.

items.name: sidebar15-block
items.title: Sidebar15 Block
items.description: A dual-sidebar workspace composed from the complete sidebar-10 navigation system and sidebar-12 calendar system.

items.name: sidebar16-block
items.title: Sidebar16 Block
items.description: An application sidebar beneath a persistent site header.

items.name: signup01-block
items.title: Signup01 Block
items.description: The swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's `signup-01` block.

items.name: signup02-block
items.title: Signup02 Block
items.description: The swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's `signup-02` block.

items.name: signup03-block
items.title: Signup03 Block
items.description: The swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's `signup-03` block.

items.name: signup04-block
items.title: Signup04 Block
items.description: The swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's `signup-04` block.

items.name: signup05-block
items.title: Signup05 Block
items.description: The swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's `signup-05` block.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: A vertically stacked set of headings that reveal sections of content.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: An inline callout for information that requires the user's attention.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog
items.description: A modal decision that requires an explicit action or cancellation.

items.name: aspect-ratio
items.title: Aspect Ratio
items.description: Constrains arbitrary content to a width-to-height ratio.

items.name: attachment
items.title: Attachment
items.description: A composable file or media attachment.

items.name: audio-level-provider
items.title: Audio Level Provider
items.description: A source of normalized audio levels for `SCLiveWaveform` and `SCBarVisualizer` — the Swift seam that replaces upstream's embedded Web Audio `AnalyserNode` binding.

items.name: aurora
items.title: Aurora
items.description: A soft, slowly drifting color wash — large blurred circles moving on sinusoidal paths over a caller-selected background.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: A composable avatar root that coordinates image and fallback loading state.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Displays arbitrary content as a compact status badge.

items.name: bar-visualizer
items.title: Bar Visualizer
items.description: A real-time frequency-band visualizer for voice agents — elevenlabs-ui's `BarVisualizer`.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: A semantic container for a composable breadcrumb trail.

items.name: bubble
items.title: Bubble
items.description: The message surface of the chat suite — shadcn's `Bubble`.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: swiftcn's button appearance for native SwiftUI `Button`s — the cva `buttonVariants` of this library.

items.name: button-group
items.title: Button Group
items.description: An attached group of arbitrary controls, text, separators, or nested groups.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: A localized, composable month calendar with single, multiple, and range selection.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: A themed surface composed from Header, Content, and Footer regions.

items.name: carousel
items.title: Carousel
items.description: A composable carousel root that provides a shared external-control state.

items.name: chart
items.title: Chart
items.description: Defines one series in a reusable native Swift Charts composition.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: A controlled, composable checkbox with checked, unchecked, and mixed states.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: An interactive panel convenience that composes Root, Trigger, and Content.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: A searchable select convenience composed from the same primitives as `SCComboboxRoot`.

items.name: command
items.title: Command
items.description: One executable entry in a command list: a title, optional icon and shortcut hint, extra search keywords, and the action to run.

items.name: context-menu
items.title: Context Menu
items.description: Attaches native context-menu content to an arbitrary trigger view.

items.name: data-table
items.title: Data Table
items.description: A reusable typed data table assembled from `SCTable` and headless controller state.

items.name: date-picker
items.title: Date Picker
items.description: A preassembled Popover + Calendar date picker.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: A composable modal dialog with caller-owned or internal presentation.

items.name: direction
items.title: Direction
items.description: Sets text, semantic-edge, control, and layout direction for arbitrary descendant content.

items.name: dot-pattern
items.title: Dot Pattern
items.description: A dotted background pattern, drawn in a single `Canvas` pass — the magicui `DotPattern` port.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: A controlled or internally managed drawer composed from a trigger, overlay, and content.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: A native dropdown menu with independently composable trigger and content.

items.name: empty
items.title: Empty
items.description: A centered empty-state container with caller-composed content.

items.name: field
items.title: Field
items.description: A caller-composed form field that propagates invalid and disabled state to its controls and lays its parts out vertically, horizontally, or responsively.

items.name: hover-card
items.title: Hover Card
items.description: A controlled or internally managed preview card with independently composable trigger and content.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: A themed single-line text field — shadcn's Input on a native `TextField`.

items.name: input-group
items.title: Input Group
items.description: A compound input surface that owns one border, focus ring, invalid state, and disabled treatment for its typed input or textarea plus arbitrary addons.

items.name: input-group-context
items.title: Input Group Context
items.description: Internal focus and validation coordination shared by Input, Textarea, and Input Group.

items.name: input-otp
items.title: Input OTP
items.description: A controlled one-time-code input with caller-composed groups, slots, and separators.

items.name: item
items.title: Item
items.description: A caller-composed item surface.

items.name: kbd
items.title: Kbd
items.description: A presentational keyboard keycap with arbitrary content.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: A form label with arbitrary content.

items.name: live-waveform
items.title: Live Waveform
items.description: A real-time audio waveform — elevenlabs-ui's `LiveWaveform`.

items.name: marker
items.title: Marker
items.description: A conversation marker — shadcn's `Marker`.

items.name: marquee
items.title: Marquee
items.description: Scrolls its content in an endless horizontal or vertical loop — the Magic UI `Marquee` port.

items.name: menubar
items.title: Menubar
items.description: A native menu collection.

items.name: message
items.title: Message
items.description: A row in the conversation — shadcn's `Message`.

items.name: message-scroller
items.title: Message Scroller
items.description: The conversation frame — shadcn's `MessageScroller` root (and, when no external state is passed, its `MessageScrollerProvider`).

items.name: native-select
items.title: Native Select
items.description: A typed native single-selection control.

items.name: navigation-menu
items.title: Navigation Menu
items.description: A controlled or internally managed collection of navigation links and rich popup menus.

items.name: number-ticker
items.title: Number Ticker
items.description: Animates numeric changes by rolling each digit into place — the magicui `NumberTicker` port, built on `contentTransition(.numericText)`.

items.name: overlay-portal
items.title: Overlay Portal
items.description: Presents content outside the caller's SwiftUI layout hierarchy.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: A navigation landmark for caller-composed page controls.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: A controlled or internally managed native popover with independent Trigger and Content slots.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Groups composable progress parts and supplies native progress accessibility.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: Provides shared typed selection to a composed set of radio items.

items.name: resizable
items.title: Resizable
items.description: Panel sizes keyed by stable panel IDs.

items.name: response
items.title: Response
items.description: Renders a markdown string with theme-token styling — the swiftcn port of elevenlabs-ui's Response, wrapping MarkdownUI the way upstream wraps Streamdown.

items.name: scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area
items.description: A focusable native ScrollView with composable content and scrollbar axes.

items.name: scroll-fade
items.title: Scroll Fade
items.description: Which container edges fade — the Swift analog of upstream's `scroll-fade`, `scroll-fade-x`, and per-edge `-t/-b/-s/-e` classes.

items.name: scrub-bar
items.title: Scrub Bar
items.description: A compound playback scrubber with a draggable track, progress fill, thumb, and time labels.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: A typed, composable Select backed by the platform Menu primitive.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: A 1pt rule that visually or semantically divides content, in the theme's border color.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: A controlled or internally managed composable Sheet.

items.name: shimmer
items.title: Shimmer
items.description: A call-to-action button with a highlight that endlessly travels its border — the v1 `ShimmerButton`, rebuilt on `SCButtonStyle` and theme tokens.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: The sidebar shell: a sidebar pane plus your main content, with collapse animation, ⌘B toggling, `@AppStorage` persistence, and an automatic sheet fallback on compact widths (iPhone).

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: A shape-composable placeholder block shown while content is loading — shadcn's `Skeleton`.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: A controlled or internally managed, single- or multi-thumb Slider.

items.name: sonner
items.title: Sonner
items.description: A promise handle returned by `SCSonner.promise`.

items.name: speech-input
items.title: Speech Input
items.description: A compact speech-to-text control — elevenlabs-ui's `SpeechInput`.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: A compact indeterminate loading indicator that inherits the caller's foreground style.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: A caller-controlled switch matching shadcn/ui's standalone Switch root.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: A themed data table — the swiftcn port of shadcn/ui's Table.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Groups a composed tab list and its matching content panels.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: A themed multi-line text area — shadcn's Textarea on a native `TextEditor`.

items.name: toast
items.title: Toast
items.description: A single notification in the shared Toast/Sonner queue.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: shadcn's Toggle: a two-state pressed button (think a toolbar Bold button), not a switch.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: Toggle Group
items.description: Provides shared single- or multiple-selection state to composed toggle items.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: A tooltip root whose closure is the trigger, mirroring shadcn/ui's `Tooltip` plus `TooltipTrigger` composition in a SwiftUI-native shape.

items.name: transcript-viewer
items.title: Transcript Viewer
items.description: A time-synced transcript viewer with word highlighting, playback controls, and scrubbing.

items.name: typography
items.title: Typography
items.description: shadcn typography `list` — a bulleted prose list (`list-disc`, spaced rows).

items.name: waveform
items.title: Waveform
items.description: A static amplitude waveform for prerecorded audio — elevenlabs-ui's `Waveform`.
